indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The open space lacks a dedicated area for focused work, making it difficult to set up a workstation.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height to place a laptop or monitor.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no chair designed for prolonged sitting, which is essential for comfort and posture during extended computer work.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be ambient and does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work.

indicators.name: no dedicated area for work
indicators.rationale: The space is not designed for focused work, lacking a designated area for a workstation.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The lack of a dedicated area, flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and task lighting makes it challenging to set up a productive workstation. The open space and lack of a dedicated area for work further undermine the suitability for focused solo computer work.
